questions.question: What is the main aim of the WHO app?
questions.correct_answer: To encourage people to practice yoga

questions.question: What does 'practice' mean as a noun?
questions.correct_answer: The actual application or exercise of a skill or knowledge

questions.question: What is the correct spelling for the verb 'to engage in an activity repeatedly'?
How often should you practice stretching to stay flexible?
What is the correct spelling for the noun 'advice'?
What is the main difference between 'practice' and 'practise'?
questions.correct_answer: One is a noun, the other is a verb

questions.question: How can you improve your skills in hockey?
questions.correct_answer: A lot of practice is required

questions.question: What should you do to strengthen your grip while running?
Why should you practise deep breathing exercises?
questions.correct_answer: To calm yourself down when feeling stressed

questions.question: What is a good habit to develop daily?

notes.title: Key concept: Practice vs Practise
notes.content: The difference between 'practice' as a noun and 'practise' as a verb

notes.title: Note: WHO app
notes.content: A collection of video and audio files to teach and support yoga practice

notes.title: Note: Aim of the app
notes.content: To encourage people across the world to practise yoga

notes.title: Note: Meaning of 'practise'
notes.content: The act of engaging in an activity repeatedly to improve or acquire a skill

notes.title: Note: Difference between noun and verb
notes.content: 'Practice' is a noun, while 'practise' is a verb

notes.title: Note: Importance of stretching
notes.content: Regular stretching helps to stay flexible

notes.title: Note: Advice vs Advise
notes.content: The difference between the noun and verb forms of 'advice'

notes.title: Note: Developing good habits
notes.content: Developing a habit of eating fruits and vegetables is beneficial

notes.title: Note: Practising yoga
notes.content: Practising yoga can improve mental and physical health

notes.title: Note: Key to improvement
notes.content: A lot of practice is required to improve skills

facts.fact: The WHO app contains a collection of video and audio files to teach and support yoga practice.
The main aim of the WHO app is to encourage people across the world to practise yoga.
The word 'practice' has different spellings depending on whether it's used as a noun or verb.
Practising yoga can improve mental and physical health.
Developing a habit of eating fruits and vegetables is beneficial for overall health.
Regular stretching helps to stay flexible and improves flexibility.
The WHO app is free and easy to use, making it accessible to people worldwide.
A lot of practice is required to improve skills in any activity or sport.
Practising deep breathing exercises can help calm yourself down when feeling stressed.
The app aims to encourage people to adopt a regular yoga practice for overall well-being.
